channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sam Altman’s fusion startup Helion Energy hits 150 million degree plasma temperature—a milestone that could bring first grid power in 2028
item.description: Helion Energy achieves plasma at a stunning 150 million degree Celsius, well above the threshold to eventually generate stable fusion power.

item.title: CEOs are still buying into the business case for sustainability, despite Trump’s climate rollbacks
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: In 4 Words, Gold Medal Skater Ilia Malinin Taught an Important Lesson About Top Performers
Why Singapore’s prime minister gave DBS and Grab a shout-out during the country’s budget speech
item.description: Lawerence Wong called on Singapore's companies to adopt AI “comprehensively”, and described DBS and Grab as firms "moving decisively on AI transformat...

item.title: Workday shed $40 billion in value. Founder Aneel Bhusri is back with a $139 million bet he can turn it around
item.description: Workday's compensation plan for its new CEO underscores how much of an uphill fight SaaS companies have in the face of AI.

item.title: Why choosing not to hire was the solution for my startup — we raised over $100 million and tripled revenue with the same people
item.description: Our startup, founded in 2020, wanted to understand whether we were building a company to scale or if we were about to mask deeper problems with headco...

item.title: 4 Breakout Strategies Fueling Brand Wins on TikTok Shop in 2026
item.description: These proven tactics separate the platform’s highest earners from the rest.

item.title: McDonald’s Just Got Some Excellent News, and It Points to Something Even Bigger Tomorrow
item.description: The way McDonald’s gets customers today can also pay off 20 years from now.

item.title: If AI is doing the work, leaders need to redesign jobs
item.description: Most managers are using AI the same way they use any productivity tool: to move faster. It summarizes meetings, drafts responses, and clears small tas...

item.title: How Strong Is Your Relationship? Neuroscience Says the Viral ‘Bird Test’ Won’t Tell You
item.description: A neuroscientist explains why you shouldn’t measure your partner’s love with the viral ‘bird test’ this Valentine’s Day.

item.title: AI Just Caused a Sell-Off in Trucking and Logistics Stocks
item.description: Trucking and freight names are AI’s latest victim in the market.

item.title: How women’s skiwear falls short when it comes to actually skiing
item.description: Marks & Spencer is one of the latest U.K. high-street brands to launch a skiwear collection. Even supermarket Lidl is in on the action, with items in ...

item.title: How to meet the surging energy demand without needing as much new electricity
item.description: This story was originally published by Grist . Sign up for Grist’s weekly newsletter here . The conversation around energy use in the United States ha...

item.title: How to let go of resentment on the job
item.description: No matter how much you like your coworkers, you’re going to have some conflicts with them. Most of those conflicts involve differences of opinion or a...

item.title: Why world models will become a platform capability, not a corporate superpower
item.description: For the past two years, artificial intelligence has felt oddly flat. Large language models spread at unprecedented speed, but they also erased much of...

item.title: These 32 favorite stocks signal the bull market is running on fumes
Social Security could run out of money even sooner than originally feared
Coinbase swings to surprise loss amid crypto exodus
Amazon's stock just entered a bear market. This ‘Mag Seven’ name could be next.
Apple sees $200 billion market-cap wipeout as stock slides on AI fears
